name: Mondi plc
description: Mondi plc is a global leader in the packaging and paper industry, dedicated to contributing to a better world through innovative and sustainable solutions. The company operates across the entire value chain, from managing forests and producing pulp and paper to converting them into high-quality packaging products. With a strong focus on sustainability, Mondi provides a broad range of tailored products, including containerboard, flexible packaging, and industrial paper bags, helping customers make environmentally responsible choices. Headquartered in the United Kingdom, Mondi maintains a significant international presence, delivering value-accretive growth while prioritizing circular-driven solutions and responsible business practices.
